div.style: font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; color: #111; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0px; white-space: nowrap;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(17, 17, 17);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

span.style: display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:48px; gap:1px; font-size:13px; line-height:1.4;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(17, 17, 17);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
